# multidesign

`multidesign` is an R package for multivariate experimental data where
the matrix alone is not enough. It keeps observation-level design
metadata and variable-level metadata attached to the data, so
subsetting, grouping, splitting, and cross-validation stay aligned.

This is especially useful for workflows in neuroimaging, behavioral
science, psychophysics, and other settings where you need to manage:

- observations such as trials, scans, or time points
- variables such as ROIs, sensors, or engineered features
- row-wise design factors such as condition, run, session, or subject
- multi-block datasets spanning subjects, sessions, or modalities

## Why use `multidesign`?

- Keep the data matrix, row design, and optional column metadata in one
  object.
- Filter observations with design-aware
  [`subset()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/subset.html) semantics.
- Select variables using column metadata via
  [`select_variables()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/select_variables.md).
- Split and summarize by experimental factors with
  [`split()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/split.html) and
  [`summarize_by()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/summarize_by.md).
- Build cross-validation folds that respect your design with
  [`fold_over()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/fold_over.md)
  and
  [`cv_rows()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/cv_rows.md).
- Scale from a single matrix to multi-subject or lazy-loading workflows
  with `hyperdesign` and `multiframe`.

## Installation

`multidesign` is not on CRAN yet. Install the development version from
GitHub:

``` r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("bbuchsbaum/multidesign")
```

## Core objects

| Class         | Use it when…                                                                            |
|---------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `multidesign` | You have one data matrix plus row-wise design information and optional column metadata. |
| `hyperdesign` | You have multiple related `multidesign` objects, such as one per subject or session.    |
| `multiframe`  | Your observations are expensive to materialize and you want lazy evaluation.            |
| `multiblock`  | You need lower-level stacked matrix operations without the full design abstraction.     |

Most workflows start with `multidesign` and move to `hyperdesign` when
the data naturally breaks into subject-, session-, or modality-level
blocks.

## Example

``` r
library(multidesign)

set.seed(42)

# Simulate a trial-by-feature matrix
X <- matrix(rnorm(40 * 8), nrow = 40, ncol = 8)

# Design metadata for each observation
design_df <- tibble::tibble(
  condition = rep(c("face", "house"), each = 20),
  run = rep(1:4, each = 10),
  trial = 1:40
)

# Metadata for each variable / column
column_df <- tibble::tibble(
  roi = paste0("ROI_", 1:8),
  network = rep(c("visual", "frontal"), each = 4)
)

# Build a multidesign object
md <- multidesign(X, design_df, column_df)

# Row-wise and column-wise access stay synchronized
face_trials <- subset(md, condition == "face")
visual_rois <- select_variables(md, network == "visual")

# Summarize by an experimental factor
condition_means <- summarize_by(md, condition)

# Create design-aware cross-validation folds
folds <- fold_over(md, run)

# Run a simple CV pipeline
cv <- cross_validate(
  folds,
  fit_fn = function(analysis) {
    list(mean = colMeans(xdata(analysis)))
  },
  score_fn = function(model, assessment) {
    mat <- xdata(assessment)
    pred <- matrix(
      model$mean,
      nrow = nrow(mat),
      ncol = ncol(mat),
      byrow = TRUE
    )
    c(mse = mean((mat - pred)^2))
  }
)

summary(cv)
```

## Typical workflow

1.  Create a `multidesign` from a matrix and a design table.
2.  Subset rows by design variables and columns by variable metadata.
3.  Summarize or split by condition, run, subject, or any other design
    factor.
4.  Generate folds with
    [`fold_over()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/fold_over.md)
    or
    [`cv_rows()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/cv_rows.md).
5.  Pass those folds into
    [`cross_validate()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/cross_validate.md)
    with your model-fitting and scoring functions.
6.  Move to `hyperdesign` when the analysis spans multiple related
    blocks.

## Learn more

- [Package website](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/)
- [Getting started
  vignette](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/vignettes/Introduction.Rmd)
- [Class overview
  vignette](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/vignettes/class_overview.Rmd)
- [Issue tracker](https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/multidesign/issues)

## Development status

The package already includes tests for the core data structures and
cross-validation pipeline, but the API is still evolving. Expect the
README and vignettes to be the best entry points while the package
matures.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`as_multidesign()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/as_multidesign.md)
  : Convert to a Multidesign Object
- [`bind_multidesign()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/bind_multidesign.md)
  : Combine multiple multidesign objects
- [`block_indices()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/block_indices.md)
  : Get Block Indices from a Multiblock Object
- [`block_indices(`*`<multiblock_list>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/block_indices.multiblock_list.md)
  : Extract Block Indices from Multiblock Object
- [`column_design()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/column_design.md)
  : Extract Column Design Information
- [`cross_validate()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/cross_validate.md)
  : Execute Cross-Validation Over Folds
- [`cv_rows()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/cv_rows.md)
  : Create Cross-validation Folds from Explicit Row Indices
- [`design()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/design.md)
  : Extract Design Information
- [`design(`*`<hyperdesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/design.hyperdesign.md)
  : Extract Design Information from Hyperdesign
- [`df_to_hyperdesign()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/df_to_hyperdesign.md)
  : Convert a Data Frame to a Hyperdesign Object
- [`fold_over()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/fold_over.md)
  : Generate Cross-validation Folds
- [`fold_over(`*`<hyperdesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/fold_over.hyperdesign.md)
  : Create Cross-Validation Folds from a Hyperdesign Object
- [`hyperdesign()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/hyperdesign.md)
  : Create a Hyperdesign Object
- [`hyperdesign(`*`<list>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/hyperdesign.list.md)
  : Construct a Hyperdesign Object
- [`init_transform()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/init_transform.md)
  : Initialize Transformation
- [`init_transform(`*`<hyperdesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/init_transform.hyperdesign.md)
  : Initialize Transformation for Hyperdesign
- [`is_cstacked()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/is_cstacked.md)
  : Test if Multiblock Object is Column Stacked
- [`is_rstacked()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/is_rstacked.md)
  : Test if Multiblock Object is Row Stacked
- [`multiblock()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/multiblock.md)
  : Create a Multiblock Object
- [`multiblock(`*`<list>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/multiblock.list.md)
  : Create a Multiblock Object from a List of Matrices
- [`multidesign()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/multidesign.md)
  : Create a Multidesign Object
- [`multiframe()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/multiframe.md)
  : Create a Multiframe Object
- [`multiframe(`*`<list>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/multiframe.list.md)
  : Create a Multiframe from a List
- [`multiframe(`*`<matrix>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/multiframe.matrix.md)
  : Create a Multiframe from a Matrix
- [`obs_group()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/obs_group.md)
  : Create a Group of Observations from Matrix or List Data
- [`observation()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/observation.md)
  : Create an Observation Object
- [`print(`*`<cv_result>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.cv_result.md)
  : Print Method for cv_result Objects
- [`print(`*`<foldlist>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.foldlist.md)
  : Print Method for Foldlist Objects
- [`print(`*`<hyperdesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.hyperdesign.md)
  : Print Method for Hyperdesign Objects
- [`print(`*`<multiblock_list>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.multiblock_list.md)
  : Print Method for Multiblock Objects
- [`print(`*`<multidesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.multidesign.md)
  : Print Method for Multidesign Objects
- [`print(`*`<multiframe>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.multiframe.md)
  : Print Method for Multiframe Objects
- [`print(`*`<observation_set>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.observation_set.md)
  : Print Method for Observation Set Objects
- [`print(`*`<reduced_multidesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/print.reduced_multidesign.md)
  : Print Method for Reduced Multidesign Objects
- [`reduce.multidesign()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/reduce.multidesign.md)
  : Reduce Dimensionality of a Multidesign Object
- [`select_variables()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/select_variables.md)
  : Select Variables Based on Column Design
- [`split(`*`<multidesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/split.multidesign.md)
  : Split a Multidesign Object by Design Variables
- [`split(`*`<multiframe>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/split.multiframe.md)
  : Split a Multiframe by Design Variables
- [`split_indices()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/split_indices.md)
  : Split Indices by Variables
- [`split_indices(`*`<multidesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/split_indices.multidesign.md)
  : Get Split Indices for a Multidesign Object
- [`` `[`( ``*`<observation_set>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/sub-.observation_set.md)
  : Extract Multiple Observations from Observation Set
- [`` `[[`( ``*`<observation_set>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/sub-sub-.observation_set.md)
  : Extract Single Observation from Observation Set
- [`subset(`*`<hyperdesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/subset.hyperdesign.md)
  : Subset a Hyperdesign Object
- [`subset(`*`<multidesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/subset.multidesign.md)
  : Subset a Multidesign Object
- [`subset(`*`<multiframe>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/subset.multiframe.md)
  : Subset a Multiframe Object
- [`summarize_by()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/summarize_by.md)
  : Summarize Data Over Grouping Variables
- [`summarize_by(`*`<multidesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/summarize_by.multidesign.md)
  : Summarize a Multidesign Object by Design Variables
- [`summarize_by(`*`<multiframe>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/summarize_by.multiframe.md)
  : Summarize a Multiframe by Design Variables
- [`summary(`*`<cv_result>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/summary.cv_result.md)
  : Summary Method for cv_result Objects
- [`t(`*`<multiblock_list>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/t.multiblock_list.md)
  : Transpose a Multiblock Object
- [`xdata()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/xdata.md)
  : Extract Data Matrix
- [`xdata(`*`<hyperdesign>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/xdata.hyperdesign.md)
  : Extract Data Matrix from Hyperdesign
- [`xdata(`*`<multiframe>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/multidesign/reference/xdata.multiframe.md)
  : Extract Data Matrix from a Multiframe Object
